def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}

    status='dispatch_result_probe_queued'

elif missing[0]=='runtime':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem843_claude_runtime_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-843 force Claude runtime proof after BEM-842 missing runtime','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-843 retry real BEM-840 Claude protocol response','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='real_bem840_response_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify real BEM-840 response'
state={'bem':'BEM-843','status':status,'bem842_status':b842.get('status'),'missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem843_route_after_bem842.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem843_route_after_bem842.md').write_text('# BEM-843 | Route After BEM-842 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-843'+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem843_route_after_bem842.json','governance/reports/bem843_route_after_bem842.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
